display.purpose: Hero and page titles (Varela Round, ceiling ~3.75rem).

body.purpose: Hebrew prose and UI text (Alef, line-height 1.7, measure 65–75ch).

label.purpose: Machine-exact values only — model IDs, scores, code (IBM Plex Mono).

shadows.name: engine-glow
shadows.purpose: Active/hovered capability surface lifts in its own hue (value shown for Standard blue).

shadows.name: inset-sheen
shadows.purpose: Top-edge highlight so glass reads as a physical surface.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Entrances and reveals (hero-entrance). Exponential ease-out, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single gold-filled action on a screen. Obsidian text for contrast.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #F59E0B; color: #080808; font-family: 'Varela Round', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FBBF24; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(245,158,11,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Everything that isn't the one primary action. Glass on obsidian.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #e2e8f0; font-family: 'Varela Round', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Capability Pill (Standard)
components.description: Signature component: selecting a mode floods its hue into the pill. Shown for Standard (blue).
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(83,118,164,0.32); color: #e2e8f0; font-family: 'Alef', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(83,118,164,0.5); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(83,118,164,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(147,197,217,0.25); cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: RTL-first field; gold focus ring; placeholder at ≥4.5:1.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" dir="rtl" placeholder="תאר/י את הפרומפט שלך..." />
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #e2e8f0; font-family: 'Alef', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 14px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 14px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.7); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.4); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Flat-by-default glass panel; hairline border, no resting shadow.
components.html:
הפרומפט המשופר

גרסה מקצועית עם מבנה ברור.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 18px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Varela Round', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card p { font-family: 'Alef', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.7; color: #94a3b8; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Peroot is a finely-machined tool for a craft: turning rough intent into professional prompts, in Hebrew, in seconds. The interface is the instrument's casing — obsidian, quiet, exact — and gold is the single calibrated marking that tells you where the meaning is. It is Hebrew-first and RTL-native, and runs a product register (app) and a brand register (marketing) off one shared token set.
keyCharacteristics: Obsidian-dark signature (#080808) with a true cool light theme (#f8fafc) — both first-class.
Gold (#F59E0B) is meaning, never decoration — ≤10% of any screen.
Rounded-geometric display (Varela Round) over humanist body (Alef), both Hebrew-native.
Depth via tinted glass + soft colored glow, not hard drop shadows.
Five engine hues, one active at a time — hue never carries meaning alone.

rules.name: The One Gold Rule
rules.body: Signal Gold appears on ≤10% of any screen — one primary action, one active state, one score. If two things are gold, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Cool-Neutral Rule
rules.body: The light surface is cool slate (#f8fafc), never warm cream/sand/paper. Warmth is carried by gold and type, not the body background.

rules.name: The Readout Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Mono is reserved for machine-exact values — model IDs, scores, code. Never decorative labels or eyebrows.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth is colored light, not gray dark. Elements glow in their own hue on state; no resting neutral drop shadow.

dos: Do keep Signal Gold to ≤10% of any screen.
Do use Deep Gold (#B45309) for gold text on light and Warm Gold (#FBBF24) on obsidian; reserve #F59E0B for fills/borders/glows.
Do convey depth with a color-matched glow on state, never a resting gray drop shadow.
Do design RTL-first; keep Latin tokens (gpt-5, code) LTR inline.
Do pair Varela Round (display) with Alef (body); reserve IBM Plex Mono for machine-exact values.
Do hold contrast at IS 5568 / WCAG 2.0 AA in both themes.
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation.
donts: Don't build generic AI-SaaS: no purple gradient blobs, no hero-metric template, no gradient text, no ChatGPT-clone chrome.
Don't use a warm cream/sand/beige body background; the light surface is cool slate.
Don't clutter: one accent hue active at a time, no gold-on-gold.
Don't use a border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use light-gray body text 'for elegance' — bump toward the ink/silver end.
Don't put tracked-uppercase eyebrows or 01/02/03 markers above every section.
